phases.name: Replace OAuth admin flow with email/password login

steps.name: Fix LoginHandler JWT: emit role claim, inline JWT construction
steps.description: LoginHandler must issue a JWT signed with IAdminSettings.JwtSecret, carrying a role:admin claim, with 480-minute lifetime. Remove ITokenGenerator dependency. Narrow IAdminSettings to JwtSecret only (drop AdminEmail). Update AdminSettings accordingly.
criteria: Successful login returns a token that authorises access to the admin post list
Token carries admin authorisation as verified by the admin post list endpoint
Login with wrong password is rejected with 'Invalid email or password'
Login with unknown email is rejected with 'Invalid email or password'
Fifth consecutive failed attempt is rejected with 'Too many failed attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.'
steps.implementation_notes: LoginHandler: replace ITokenGenerator dependency with IAdminSettings. Issue JWT with role:admin claim, signed with IAdminSettings.JwtSecret, expiring in 480 minutes. IAdminSettings interface: remove AdminEmail property, retain JwtSecret. AdminSettings implementation: remove adminEmail constructor parameter and property. Unit test (LoginHandlerShould) stubs IAdminSettings only.
steps.scenario_name: Christian logs in and can immediately manage posts

steps.name: Delete 10 dead OAuth files and clean up registrations
steps.description: Remove all OAuth admin infrastructure: 10 source files deleted, DI registrations removed from Program.cs, test overrides removed from WebApplicationFactory. No new logic — deletion and cleanup only.
criteria: Backend builds and all existing tests pass after deletions
All acceptance tests leveraging admin authentication pass without OAuth infrastructure stubs
steps.implementation_notes: Program.cs: remove Redis block, keyed IOAuthClient('admin'), ITokenGenerator registration, app.MapAdminOAuthEndpoints() call. WebApplicationFactory: remove TestAdminOAuthEmail constant, keyed IOAuthClient('admin') override, IAdminTokenStore override, Admin:Email config key. Enable F-09 and F-10 scenarios.
steps.scenario_name: Old admin OAuth initiate endpoint is no longer available

steps.name: Update AuthorMode step definitions to use login endpoint
steps.description: Replace OAuth stub calls in three AuthSteps methods with direct POST /api/auth/login via the auth driver. Acceptance tests relying on GivenChristianIsAuthenticatedAsAdmin must pass without any OAuth infrastructure.
criteria: Authenticated author can access the admin post list after login via the auth driver
Acceptance tests GivenChristianIsAuthenticatedAsAdmin, GivenChristianHasAValidAdminSession pass without OAuth stubs
No OAuth-related step definitions remain in AuthSteps.cs
steps.implementation_notes: Update three step definitions to authenticate via POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials instead of OAuth stubs. Remove all OAuth-related calls. Enable F-01 scenario.
steps.scenario_name: Authenticated author accesses the admin post list without interruption

steps.name: Replace OAuth button on admin login page with email/password form
steps.description: Update admin/login.astro: remove OAuth redirect button, add email/password form with fetch-based submit, loading state, inline error display, and lockout message on 429 response.
criteria: Admin login page renders an email input, password input, and submit button
Successful login redirects to the admin area
Wrong credentials display an inline error message without page reload
429 response displays the lockout message inline
npm run build passes with no errors
steps.implementation_notes: No BDD scenario targets this step — quality gate is a passing frontend build. Remove OAuth button and OAuth-related links. Admin login form submits email/password to POST /api/auth/login endpoint. Display errors inline without page reload. Handle 429 response with inline lockout message.
